notes: Strong out-of-scope discipline and risk-flagging on MRM independence; however, the model substitutes CPG 220 (Australian APRA standard) for the NZ-specific FMA algorithmic fairness methodology and MRM 2023 policy constraints called for by the corpus, resulting in fabricated/misattributed regulatory constraints (D7) and missed FMA-prescribed fairness methodology assumptions (D5), while the problem framing is partially solution-oriented (governance/deployment framing) rather than purely cost-and-gap framing.
